findings.network_health: Moderate on-chain activity with 674k transactions in 24h and a robust hashrate of 937 EH/s. Block production at 138 blocks in 24h is normal, indicating stable network consensus and consistent miner confidence despite elevated mempool activity (5.4k pending transactions).
findings.top_onchain_signal: Strong exchange distribution (-2.35k BTC netflow) combined with persistent Fear sentiment (30/100) and options downside gravity (max pain $76k vs $77.5k spot) creates a bearish setup. No large whale accumulation detected, reinforcing the distribution phase. MVRV at 1.42 (fair value) offers no valuation cushion for holders.
